title: Docker Compose の 404 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article accurately identifies common causes of Docker Compose 404 errors.
It provides practical and well-explained solutions with clear code examples.
The troubleshooting steps suggested are standard and effective.
The information is current and relevant to modern Docker Compose usage.

sources.title: Docker Compose の 404 エラー：原因と解決策 - Zenn
sources.claim: Docker Compose 404 errors occur when images, services, volumes, or networks specified in `docker-compose.yml` (or `compose.yml`) are not found. This error is mostly caused by image pull failures, misconfigured build contexts, or missing dependent resources. Docker Compose outputs this error and stops processing when it detects that a reference does not exist while trying to start or build containers.

sources.title: Error response from daemon: pull access denied for repository does not exist or may require 'docker login'を解決する方法を解説 | Linux・ネットワークの学習サイトInfraAcademy(インフラアカデミー)
sources.claim: Example error message: `Error response from daemon: pull access denied for <your-image-name>, repository does not exist or may require 'docker login'`

sources.title: Dockerfile not found with docker-compose
sources.claim: Cause 2: 404 error occurs if the `build` context path is missing or incorrect, preventing Docker Compose from building the image.

sources.title: ビルドコンテキスト - docker image build, COPY でディレクトリが見つからない - - Qiita
sources.claim: Cause 2: 404 error occurs if the `build` context path is missing or incorrect, preventing Docker Compose from building the image.

sources.title: Docker compose cant find file inside docker build context - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: Cause 2: 404 error occurs if the `build` context path is missing or incorrect, preventing Docker Compose from building the image.

sources.title: Docker compose and nginx volumes 404
sources.claim: Cause 3: 404 error occurs if external volumes (`external: true`) or external networks are referenced but not pre-created on the Docker host.

sources.title: Docker Composeで「network not found」が出たときの具体的な対処法 - 前菜の備忘録
sources.claim: Cause 3: 404 error occurs if external volumes (`external: true`) or external networks are referenced but not pre-created on the Docker host.

sources.title: docker login - Docker Docs
sources.claim: In Docker Compose environments, registry authentication might be required when pulling images. For private registries, `docker login` is needed before `docker compose up`.

sources.title: Setting Up and Securing Your Own Docker Registry: A Comprehensive Guide

sources.title: docker image build, COPY でディレクトリが見つからない
sources.claim: When building local images with `docker compose build`, the Dockerfile must exist within the directory specified by `context`. If not found, Docker Compose outputs a 404 equivalent error.

sources.title: Troubleshooting docker-compose Startup Issues Using the –verbose Option - Baeldung
sources.claim: `docker compose up --build --verbose` shows more detailed build logs to pinpoint the error.
